AirConditionerMode.descriptor: Controls air conditioner mode and temperature settings

cool - Cooling mode that lowers the room temperature
heat - Heating mode that raises the room temperature

SetTargetTemperature.descriptor: Controls air conditioner mode and temperature settings

enums_descriptor: auto - The fan is on auto
sleep - The fan is in sleep mode to reduce noise
low - The fan is on low
medium - The fan is on medium
high - The fan is on high
quiet - The fan is on quiet mode to reduce noise
windFree - The fan is on wind free mode to reduce the feeling of cold air
off - The fan is off

CameraState.descriptor: Controls camera device for image/video capture and streaming
enums_descriptor: off - The camera is powered off
on - The camera is powered on and operational
restarting - The camera is in the process of restarting
unavailable - The camera is not accessible or has encountered an error

Image.return_descriptor: The latest image captured by the camera

Stream.descriptor: Controls camera device for image/video capture and streaming
Stream.return_descriptor: The current video stream from the camera

Video.descriptor: Controls camera device for image/video capture and streaming
Video.return_descriptor: The latest video captured by the camera

CaptureVideo.descriptor: Controls camera device for image/video capture and streaming

StopStream.descriptor: Controls camera device for image/video capture and streaming

CarbonDioxide.return_descriptor: The level of carbon dioxide detected

ChargingState.descriptor: The current status of battery charging
ChargingState.return_descriptor: The current charging state of the device
enums_descriptor: charging - The battery is actively being charged
discharging - The battery is supplying power and losing charge
stopped - Charging has been stopped but the battery is not full
fullyCharged - The battery has reached full capacity
error - A charging error has occurred

Power.descriptor: The current status of battery charging

Voltage.descriptor: The current status of battery charging
Voltage.return_descriptor: The voltage of the battery in millivolts

Datetime.return_descriptor: Current date and time as string - format: YYYYMMddhhmm

tuesday - Tuesday

Color.descriptor: Allows for control of a color changing device

SetColor.descriptor: Allows for control of a color changing device
SetColor.argument_descriptor: Set the color of the device
SetColor.argument_bounds: RGB color value in format 'r|g|b' (0-255 for each)

Contact.descriptor: Allows reading the value of a contact sensor device
Contact.return_descriptor: The current state of the contact sensor. True if the sensor is closed, False if it is open.

DehumidifierMode.descriptor: Allows for the control of the dehumidifier mode.
enums_descriptor: cooling - Cooling cycle during operation
delayWash - Scheduled wash or dry cycle with a delayed start
drying - Active drying cycle
finished - The current operation has completed
refreshing - Refresh cycle to remove odors from fabrics
weightSensing - Detecting load weight to optimize operation
wrinklePrevent - Periodic tumbling to prevent wrinkles after drying
dehumidifying - Actively removing moisture from the air
AIDrying - AI-powered optimized drying based on sensor data
sanitizing - High-temperature sanitization cycle to eliminate bacteria
internalCare - Internal component cleaning and maintenance cycle
freezeProtection - Prevents internal freezing in cold ambient conditions
continuousDehumidifying - Continuous dehumidification without automatic stop
thawingFrozenInside - Thawing frozen internal components for recovery

SetDehumidifierMode.descriptor: Allows for the control of the dehumidifier mode.

DishwasherMode.descriptor: Allows for the control of the dishwasher mode.
enums_descriptor: eco - Energy-saving wash cycle with lower water temperature
intense - Intensive wash cycle for heavily soiled dishes
auto - Automatically selects optimal wash settings based on load
quick - Fast wash cycle for lightly soiled dishes
rinse - Rinse-only cycle without detergent
dry - Drying cycle after washing

SetDishwasherMode.descriptor: Allows for the control of the dishwasher mode.
SetDishwasherMode.argument_bounds: Set the dishwasher mode to "eco", "intense", "auto", "quick", "rinse", or "dry" mode

DoorState.descriptor: Allow for the control of a door
DoorState.return_descriptor: The current state of the door
enums_descriptor: closed - The door is fully closed
closing - The door is in the process of closing
open - The door is fully open
opening - The door is in the process of opening
unknown - The door state cannot be determined

Close.descriptor: Allow for the control of a door

Open.descriptor: Allow for the control of a door

DoorLockState.descriptor: Allow for the control of a door lock
DoorLockState.return_descriptor: The current state of the door lock
enums_descriptor: closed - The door lock is in the locked (secured) state
closing - The door lock is in the process of locking
open - The door lock is in the unlocked state
opening - The door lock is in the process of unlocking
unknown - The door lock state cannot be determined

Lock.descriptor: Allow for the control of a door lock

Unlock.descriptor: Allow for the control of a door lock

quick - Fast drying cycle for lightly damp items
quiet - Reduced noise operation mode
lownoise - Low noise operation mode
lowenergy - Energy-saving drying cycle

min - Minimum drying intensity
max - Maximum drying intensity
night - Quiet operation optimized for nighttime use
day - Standard daytime operation mode
normal - Standard drying cycle for everyday items
delicate - Gentle drying cycle for delicate fabrics
heavy - Intensive drying cycle for heavy or bulky items
whites - Drying cycle optimized for white fabrics

CurrentLevel.descriptor: Allows for the control of the level of a device like a light or a dimmer switch.
CurrentLevel.return_descriptor: A number that represents the current level, usually ``0-100`` in percent

MaxLevel.descriptor: Allows for the control of the level of a device like a light or a dimmer switch.

MinLevel.descriptor: Allows for the control of the level of a device like a light or a dimmer switch.

MoveToLevel.descriptor: Allows for the control of the level of a device like a light or a dimmer switch.
MoveToLevel.argument_descriptor: Move the level to the given value. If the device supports being turned on and off then it will be turned on if ``level`` is greater than 0 and turned off if ``level`` is equal to 0.
MoveToLevel.argument_bounds: The level value, usually ``0-100`` in percent | The rate at which to change the level

xy - CIE 1931 XY chromaticity color mode
ct - Color Temperature (Mireds) mode

ColorTemperatureMireds.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster

CurrentBrightness.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster

CurrentHue.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster

CurrentSaturation.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster

CurrentX.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster

CurrentY.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster

EnhancedCurrentHue.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster
EnhancedCurrentHue.return_descriptor: Enhanced current hue value with 16-bit precision (0-65535)

EnhancedMoveToHue.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster
EnhancedMoveToHue.argument_descriptor: Move to the specified enhanced hue value (16-bit precision) in a given direction over a transition time
EnhancedMoveToHue.argument_bounds: Target enhanced hue value with 16-bit precision (0-65535) | Direction to rotate around the hue circle | Transition time in seconds

EnhancedMoveToHueAndSaturation.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster
EnhancedMoveToHueAndSaturation.argument_descriptor: Move to the specified enhanced hue and saturation values simultaneously over a transition time
EnhancedMoveToHueAndSaturation.argument_bounds: Target enhanced hue value with 16-bit precision (0-65535) | Target saturation value (0-254) | Transition time in seconds

MoveColor.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster
MoveColor.argument_descriptor: Continuously move the XY color coordinates at the specified rate
MoveColor.argument_bounds: Rate of change for X coordinate per second | Rate of change for Y coordinate per second

MoveColorTemperature.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster
MoveColorTemperature.argument_descriptor: Continuously move the color temperature in the specified direction at the given rate
MoveColorTemperature.argument_bounds: Movement mode (stop, up, or down) | Rate of color temperature change per second in mireds | Minimum color temperature limit in mireds | Maximum color temperature limit in mireds

MoveHue.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster
MoveHue.argument_descriptor: Continuously move the hue in the specified direction at the given rate
MoveHue.argument_bounds: Movement mode (stop, up, or down) | Rate of hue change per second

MoveToBrightness.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster
MoveToBrightness.argument_descriptor: Move the Brightness to the given value. If the device supports being turned on and off then it will be turned on if ``brightness`` is greater than 0 and turned off if ``brightness`` is equal to 0.
MoveToBrightness.argument_bounds: The brightness value, usually ``0-100`` in percent | The rate at which to change the brightness

MoveToColor.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster
MoveToColor.argument_descriptor: Move to the specified CIE 1931 XY color coordinates over a given transition time
MoveToColor.argument_bounds: Target CIE 1931 X chromaticity coordinate (0.0-1.0) | Target CIE 1931 Y chromaticity coordinate (0.0-1.0) | Transition time in seconds

MoveToColorTemperature.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster
MoveToColorTemperature.argument_descriptor: Move to the specified color temperature over a transition time
MoveToColorTemperature.argument_bounds: Target color temperature in mireds | Transition time in seconds

MoveToHue.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster
MoveToHue.argument_descriptor: Move to the specified hue value in a given direction over a transition time
MoveToHue.argument_bounds: Target hue value (0-254) | Direction to rotate around the hue circle | Transition time in seconds

MoveToHueAndSaturation.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster
MoveToHueAndSaturation.argument_descriptor: Move to the specified hue and saturation values simultaneously over a transition time
MoveToHueAndSaturation.argument_bounds: Target hue value (0-254) | Target saturation value (0-254) | Transition time in seconds

MoveToSaturation.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster
MoveToSaturation.argument_descriptor: Move to the specified saturation value over a transition time
MoveToSaturation.argument_bounds: Target saturation value (0-254) | Transition time in seconds

StepColor.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster
StepColor.argument_descriptor: Step the XY color coordinates by the specified amount over a given transition time
StepColor.argument_bounds: Step size for X coordinate | Step size for Y coordinate | Transition time in seconds

StepColorTemperature.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster
StepColorTemperature.argument_descriptor: Step the color temperature by the specified amount in a given direction over a transition time
StepColorTemperature.argument_bounds: Step direction (up or down) | Step size for color temperature change in mireds | Transition time in seconds | Minimum color temperature limit in mireds | Maximum color temperature limit in mireds

StepHue.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity with color control capabilities based on the Matter Color Control cluster
StepHue.argument_descriptor: Step the hue by the specified amount in a given direction over a transition time
StepHue.argument_bounds: Step direction (up or down) | Step size for hue change | Transition time in seconds

Brightness.descriptor: A numerical representation of the brightness intensity

OvenMode.descriptor: Allows for the control of the oven mode
enums_descriptor: heating - General heating with top and bottom elements
grill - Top heating element for grilling
warming - Low temperature to keep food warm
defrosting - Low temperature cycle to thaw frozen food
Conventional - Traditional top and bottom heating elements
Bake - Bottom element focused baking mode
BottomHeat - Bottom heating element only
ConvectionBake - Fan-assisted baking with even heat distribution
ConvectionRoast - Fan-assisted roasting for uniform browning
Broil - High heat from top element for broiling
ConvectionBroil - Fan-assisted broiling for even cooking
SteamCook - Steam injection cooking for moist results
SteamBake - Steam-assisted baking for crispy crust and moist interior
SteamRoast - Steam-assisted roasting for juicy results
SteamBottomHeatplusConvection - Bottom heat with fan and steam combined
Microwave - Microwave-only cooking mode
MWplusGrill - Microwave combined with grill heating
MWplusConvection - Microwave combined with convection fan
MWplusHotBlast - Microwave combined with hot air blast
MWplusHotBlast2 - Microwave combined with enhanced hot air blast
SlimMiddle - Slim heating element at medium power
SlimStrong - Slim heating element at high power
SlowCook - Low temperature slow cooking over extended time
Proof - Low temperature mode for yeast dough proofing
Dehydrate - Low temperature with fan for food dehydration
Others - Other cooking modes not listed
StrongSteam - Intensive steam cooking at high steam output
Descale - Self-cleaning descaling cycle to remove mineral buildup
Rinse - Water rinse cleaning cycle

AddMoreTime.descriptor: Allows for the control of the oven mode

SetCookingParameters.descriptor: Allows for the control of the oven mode

SetCookingParameters.argument_bounds: Set the mode of the oven | Set the cooking time of the oven

SetOvenMode.descriptor: Allows for the control of the oven mode

SetVolume.descriptor: Speaker device for audio playback and media control
SetVolume.argument_descriptor: Set the speaker volume level. Returns the new volume level.

Speak.descriptor: Speaker device for audio playback and media control

Stop.descriptor: Speaker device for audio playback and media control

VolumeDown.descriptor: Speaker device for audio playback and media control
VolumeDown.argument_descriptor: Set the speaker volume level. Return the new volume level

VolumeUp.descriptor: Speaker device for audio playback and media control
VolumeUp.argument_descriptor: Set the speaker volume level. Return the new volume level

Switch.descriptor: Allows for the control of a Switch device
Switch.return_descriptor: The state of the Switch device

Off.descriptor: Allows for the control of a Switch device

On.descriptor: Allows for the control of a Switch device

Toggle.descriptor: Allows for the control of a Switch device
Toggle.argument_descriptor: Toggle a Switch. Returns the new state of the Switch.

Temperature.descriptor: Get the temperature from a Device that reports current temperature
Temperature.return_descriptor: A number that usually represents the current temperature

ValveState.descriptor: Controls a valve to open or close it

Close.descriptor: Controls a valve to open or close it

Open.descriptor: Controls a valve to open or close it

enums_descriptor: thunderstorm - Thunderstorm with lightning and heavy rain
drizzle - Light, fine rain with small droplets
rain - Moderate to heavy rainfall
snow - Snowfall or snow showers
mist - Thin fog with visibility above 1 km
smoke - Reduced visibility due to smoke particles
haze - Atmospheric haze from dust or pollution reducing visibility
dust - Airborne dust particles reducing visibility
fog - Dense fog with visibility below 1 km
sand - Sandstorm or blowing sand conditions
ash - Volcanic ash particles in the atmosphere
squall - Sudden strong wind gust
tornado - Violent rotating column of air (tornado warning)
clear - Clear sky with no significant cloud cover
clouds - Overcast or partly cloudy sky conditions

GetWeatherInfo.argument_descriptor: Get the current weather information - Return whole weather information, format: "temperature, humidity, pressure, pm25, pm10, weather, weather_string, icon_id, location"
GetWeatherInfo.argument_bounds: The latitude of the location | The longitude of the location

CurrentPosition.descriptor: Controls a window covering to open or close it
CurrentPosition.return_descriptor: Current position of the window covering (0-100)

WindowCoveringType.descriptor: Controls a window covering to open or close it
enums_descriptor: window - Standard window covering (e.g., curtain or drape)
blind - Slatted blind (horizontal or vertical)
shade - Roller shade or pull-down shade

DownOrClose.descriptor: Controls a window covering to open or close it

SetLevel.descriptor: Controls a window covering to open or close it
SetLevel.argument_descriptor: Set the level of the window covering (0-100). Return the level set.
SetLevel.argument_bounds: Level to set the window covering to (0-100)

Stop.descriptor: Controls a window covering to open or close it

UpOrOpen.descriptor: Controls a window covering to open or close it
